# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh

---
# API Gateway - Istio sidecar ENABLED (public-facing, needs mTLS and traffic management)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    version: v1
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    proxy.istio.io/config: |
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
      proxyMetadata:
        ISTIO_META_DNS_CAPTURE: "true"
        ISTIO_META_DNS_AUTO_ALLOCATE: "true"
    sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
      version: v1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "443"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8080"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: registry.example.com/api-gateway:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: UPSTREAM_USER_SERVICE
              value: "http://user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: UPSTREAM_ORDER_SERVICE
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /etc/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        - name: config-volume
          configMap:
            name: api-gateway-config
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway

---
# User Service - Istio sidecar ENABLED (internal service, needs mTLS)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
    version: v1
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    proxy.istio.io/config: |
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
      version: v1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "300m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8081"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8081"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: registry.example.com/user-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "8081"
            - name: DB_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: user-service-db-secret
                  key: host
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: user-service-db-secret
                  key: password
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: user-service

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar ENABLED (internal service, needs mTLS and retries)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    proxy.istio.io/config: |
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
      terminationDrainDuration: 30s
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8082"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8082"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: registry.example.com/order-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "8082"
            - name: PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"
            - name: USER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: DB_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: order-service-db-secret
                  key: host
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: order-service-db-secret
                  key: password
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 300m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service

---
# Payment Service - Istio sidecar ENABLED with strict mTLS (handles sensitive financial data)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
    security-tier: critical
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    proxy.istio.io/config: |
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
      terminationDrainDuration: 45s
      proxyMetadata:
        ISTIO_META_DNS_CAPTURE: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
      version: v1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
        security-tier: critical
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8083"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: ""
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8083"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: registry.example.com/payment-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "8083"
            - name: PAYMENT_GATEWAY_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-secret
                  key: gateway-url
            - name: PAYMENT_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-secret
                  key: api-key
            - name: DB_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-db-secret
                  key: host
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-db-secret
                  key: password
            - name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: payment-service-secret
                  key: encryption-key
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 300m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service

---
# Notification Service - Istio sidecar DISABLED (non-critical, fire-and-forget, reduce overhead)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    description: "Sidecar injection disabled - non-critical async notification service"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8084"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: registry.example.com/notification-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "8084"
            - name: SMTP_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-service-secret
                  key: smtp-host
            - name: SMTP_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-service-secret
                  key: smtp-password
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 300m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi

---
# Services
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - Enforce strict mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - Permissive for notification-service (no sidecar)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: notification-service-permissive
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - Restrict payment-service access to order-service only
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/order-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["POST", "GET"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/payments/*", "/healthz/*"]

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - Restrict user-service access
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/api-gateway-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/order-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/users/*", "/healthz/*"]

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - Deny all other traffic by default
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  {}

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - Allow api-gateway to receive external traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            paths: ["/api/*", "/healthz/*"]

---
# Istio DestinationRule - Circuit breaking for payment-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-circuit-breaker
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
# Istio DestinationRule - mTLS for all services
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: "*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
# NetworkPolicy - Restrict ingress to api-gateway only from istio-ingressgateway
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              istio: ingressgateway
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080

---
# NetworkPolicy - Deny all ingress by default
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress

---
# NetworkPolicy - Allow internal mesh communication
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-mesh-internal
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8083
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8084
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 15090

---
# ConfigMap for api-gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-config
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
data:
  config.yaml: |
    server:
      port: 8080
      readTimeout: 30s
      writeTimeout: 30s
      idleTimeout: 120s
    rateLimit:
      enabled: true
      requestsPerSecond: 100
    cors:
      allowedOrigins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
      allowedMethods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      allowedHeaders:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type

---
# PodDisruptionBudget for critical services
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-pdb
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: payment-service-pdb
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: order-service-pdb
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
